name: Full-o'fruit Bars
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Crushed pineapple in juice, drained (reserve 1 teaspoon juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, salt, nutmeg, baking soda, and cinnamon; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream the butter until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugar and continue to cream until well blended.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla extract.
5. Stir in the pineapple juice (reserve 1 teaspoon) and mix thoroughly.
6. Fold in apples and raisins until evenly distributed.
7. Evenly spread mixture into a greased 15 x 10 x 1 inch jelly-roll pan.
8. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for 20 minutes or until a pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack.
10. Spread with Cream Cheese Icing.
11. Cut into 64 bars.
12. Garnish each bar with a walnut half.
